description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a bold two-tone color scheme of bright orange and sky blue. The upper is primarily orange with blue overlays on the toe cap, heel, and collar, and it is adorned with subtle graphic patterns and a skull motif embossed on the outer ankle. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and the lacing system uses standard eyelets with matching orange laces. The midsole and outsole are thick and appear to be made of durable rubber, providing ample cushioning and grip. Decorative stitching and embossed details add visual interest, while the overall design suggests a streetwear or urban fashion influence. The shoe appears clean, structurally intact, and unworn.
description: A vibrant high-top sneaker in orange and blue with graphic details, padded collar, and standard lacing. The shoe is clean, new, and designed for urban streetwear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded blue toe cap, orange upper, and orange laces with a padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the orange upper, blue overlays, graphic patterns, and embossed logo on the ankle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the blue heel counter, orange heel tab, and the shoe's high collar.
description_view_3: Right side view features the skull motif on the ankle, orange and blue color blocking, and visible lacing.
attribute_logo: skull motif embossed on the outer ankle in blue
